# ElicitResult.Content property

OPTIONAL. The collected field values (spec §20.5). Present only when [`Action`](./Action.md) is Accept and the mode was form; omitted for URL-mode responses and typically for decline/cancel. When present, each value is a string, number, boolean, or array of strings, and the map MUST conform to the request's `requestedSchema`.

```csharp
public JsonObject? Content { get; set; }
```
